---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# Postprocessing Shadows

## get_factorized_shadows

## get_dense_shadows

## get_expect_shadow 

```{julia}
@doc get_expect_shadow
```

>Compute the average expectation value of an MPO operator O using an array of shadow objects.

---
get_expect_shadow(O::MPO, shadows::AbstractArray{<:AbstractShadow}; compute_sem::Bool = false)

>compute_sem::Bool (optional): If true, also compute the standard error of the mean (SEM) for
statistical error analysis. Default is false.

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
ops = ["I" for _ = 1:2]
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", 2);
O = MPO(ComplexF64, site_indices, ops)
shadowtensor = random_itensor(site_indices[1]', site_indices[2]', site_indices[1], site_indices[2]);
shadow = DenseShadow(shadowtensor, 2, site_indices);
mean_val, sem_val = get_expect_shadow(O, [shadow, shadow], compute_sem=true)
```

---
get_expect_shadow(O::MPO, shadow::AbstractShadow)

```{julia}
@show get_expect_shadow(O, shadow)
```

## get_trace_moment 

```{julia}
@doc get_trace_moment
```

---
get_trace_moment(shadows::Array{<:AbstractShadow, 2 or 1}, kth_moment::Int; O::Union{Nothing, MPO}=nothing, compute_sem::Bool = false, compute_renyi::Bool = false)

>compute_renyi::Bool (optional): If true, returns the Rényi-k entropy Sk = (1/(1-k)) * log₂(pk) instead of the raw trace moment (default:false).
>bias(Returns): The bias correction from jackknife resampling
>sem(Returns): The standard error of the mean.

```{julia}
estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment([shadow shadow; shadow shadow;], 2; compute_sem=true)
renyi_entropy = get_trace_moment([shadow shadow; shadow shadow;], 2; compute_renyi=true) # if compute_renyi=true, returns the Rényi-k entropy Sk instead of the raw trace moment
```

---
get_trace_moment(ψ::Union{MPS, MPO}, k::Int, subsystem::Vector{Int}=collect(1:length(ψ)))

```{julia}
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",5);
ψ = random_mps(ComplexF64, site_indices, linkdims=5)
moment = get_trace_moment(ψ, 1, [1, 5])
moment = get_trace_moment(ψ, 2, [1, 5])
```

---
get_trace_moment(spec::ITensor, k::Int)

用到再说，spec is a ITensor to storage 纯态 eigenvalue.
